appraisal_events.evidence: « Dites donc, ... j'ai bien envie de manger quelque chose. Qu'en diriez-vous ? » ... « En attendant, Gilberte me faisait “mon thé”. ... elle s'informait encore de la mienne [faim] ... me demandait même l'heure à laquelle mes parents dînaient »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Gilberte as a considerate, lightly authoritative hostess who includes him, caters to his appetite, and manages the scene, which locally elevates her standing in this setting.

status_effects.explanation: By directing the move to the dining room, tending to the narrator, and casually managing the ritual, Gilberte occupies a leading social role in the scene.
